description: Letter from Simḥa ha-Kohen (Alexandria) to his father-in-law Eliyyahu the Judge (Fustat), explaining a recent incident involving two cloaks worth 109 dirhams and a brush with the police. He congratulates Eliyyahu on the upcoming wedding of his son Abū l-Barakāt (=Shelomo). Simḥa has been unable to fulfill an obligation to Eliyyahu because his wife (Eliyyahu's daughter) has been sick for the last year, and he has been unable to travel. See also T-S 13J24.10.
tags: illness: chronic, Illness: women's, Eliyyahu b. Zekharia, Judge Eliyyahu, Simha ha-Kohen, illness: amrad, illness: dying, Illness, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב משמחה הכהן (אלכסנדריה) לחמיו אליהו השופט (פוסטאט), מסביר תקרית הנוגעת לשני גלימות ב-109 דרהם ועימות עם המשטרה. מזל טוב על חתונת בן אליהו אבו אל-ברכאת. אשת שמחה חלתה שנה
